roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER GLENN ALVENDIA/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - PHOTO OF A BLACK AND SILVER FIREARM/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER BRANDON ROCK/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 - PHOTO OF CAR INTERIOR DRIVER'S SIDE SEAT AREA/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER BRANDON DISBROW//EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 3 - PHOTO OF TWO PLASTIC BAGS CONTAINING SUSPECTED NARCOTICS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 4 - NARCOTICS PROP 115 FORM/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER MALEKJISRAWI/WIT SWORN:SFPD SGT, NICOLAS PENA/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE IS DENIED AFTER HEARING,/X:AFTER HEARING, THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FOR A FIRST DISMISSAL OF THIS CASE WHICH IS GRANTED BY THE COURT,/CTORD:DEFENDANT'S GPS DEVICE REQUIREMENT FOR THIS CASE IS TERMINATED/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/X:THE CO-DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/STIPLD:12-21-18/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MTS/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE, DA MOTION TO DETAIN/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN IS DENIED/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO TERMINATE ELECTRONICE MONITORING IS DENIED/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:4 HOURS/DOP/

/X:THE PEOPLE FILE A NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:NATHAN QUIGLEY, FOR THE PEOPLE, REPRESENTING CO-DEFENDANT, NAKIDA LAMPKINSIN CASE #17006305, ALSO PRESENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 11-13-18/987,2/X:THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE REQUEST TO RELEASE DEFENDANT OUT OF CUSTODY AS FOLLOWS:/OR/X:WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THE FOLLOWING:/X:DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE A CURFEW DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS: 12AM TO 6AM/WS/WEAP/X:DEFENDANT CANNOT POSSES ANY TYPE OF WEAPONS FOR EMPLOYMENT/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & TO SET MOTION TO DETAIN HRG/LDPX:11-13-18/CONT/DOP/
